sqls.name: view_overview
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_overview AS SELECT Customer_Info.customer_id, Customer_Info.age, Customer_Info.senior_citizen, Customer_Info.partner, Customer_Info.dependents, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.churn_score FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id;

sqls.name: view_exploration
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_exploration AS SELECT Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.churn_value, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Status_Analysis;

sqls.name: view_detail
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_detail AS SELECT Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.cltv FROM Status_Analysis;

sqls.name: view_insight
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_insight AS SELECT Customer_Info.age, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.churn_score FROM Customer_Info JOIN Status_Analysis ON Customer_Info.customer_id = Status_Analysis.customer_id;
